$schema_note: Claude Code settings.json for the chat subprocess in the edge container (#650).
$comment: Chat-Claude runs inside the edge container as a subprocess of chat-server.py,
this file when it lives at .claude/settings.json inside the cwd.
- defaultMode = acceptEdits (never bypassPermissions — the chat session is
still an OAuth-gated operator surface, not an unconfined shell).
- allow list: nomad job/read-only ops, docker inspect/log ops, disinto CLI,
git, curl against the on-box Forgejo API.
- deny list: destructive ops that could wipe factory state (docker volume rm,
nomad system gc, rm -rf /, direct /var/run/docker.sock pokes).
This file is installed into $CHAT_WORKSPACE_DIR/.claude/settings.json at
container start by docker/edge/entrypoint-edge.sh. Edit here, rebuild edge
